    • The

      Phoenix Process

      Alchemical transformation in your daily life...

      can be High Level Fun!

    • IT ONLY TAKES ONE

      It only takes one awake person to speak out.

      If you are awake and you are the one to notice the tribal dynamics calling up shadow-world demons and you do not transcend your inner cyclone of hesitations and speak clearly about what is going on until people’s awareness shifts and something different happens, then how can you imagine you are not sourcing the shadow-world yourself?

       

      If you do not speak out, who will?

       

      If you expect someone else to speak out, why do you think it would be any easier for them than for you?

       

      The key is to create an authentically curious listening space. The way is to confront with vacuum-making questions.

       

      You can say, “I need to have a conversation about this conversation. In order to get to know you better would you please explain to me how a person such as yourself would choose to take the perspective that…?”

       

      Check the purpose being reflected by the results. The results don’t lie.

       

      Check the intention being mirrored by what is happening. What you have is what you want. But which “you” is doing the wanting?

      Bring current conditions into breakdown. It is Phoenix Process time:

       

    • The Phoenix Process

      How It Works

      1

      STEP ONE

      Live Full Out until you crash and burn.

      2

      STEP TWO

      Pull all the rugs out from under yourself. Throw all the bugs into the fire. Stir the mess until current conditions completely disintegrate and burn cleanly until only cold ashes remain.

      3

      STEP THREE

      Stay present together in the desolate nothingness and wait attentively until the next thing starts. Do not try to hurry this part. The in-between state might take longer than is comfortable, and there is no guarantee... (HINT: Nothingness is a required condition for learning to fly. Human beings are designed to fly.)

      4

      STEP FOUR

      When the next thing starts, pay close attention to what you could do differently this time. Go back to Step 1.

    • FOUR BRAINS AND THEIR UNDERWORLD TENDENCIES

      We have a theory suggesting that the style of underworld that takes over in your part of the gameworld depends on which brain type is dominant for you.

       

      For example:

      Yellow Brain – unconscious joy empowers your Gremlin clown to joke around, evade, disregard, disrespect, belittle. You ridiculize people to death, passive-aggressively making meaninglessness. Making someone look stupid or irrelevant lets you undermine human connections or sincere efforts. You remain untouched by deflecting feedback.

       

      Green Brain – unconscious sadness makes you adaptive. Then you can assert cruelty, feel betrayed, viciously complain, and righteously plot revenge. You whip up a revolt or mutiny against the projected authority figures, destroying the system, playing needy as a hungry vampire or doing low-drama rescues to save the day and be secretly superior.

       

      Red Brain – unconscious anger forces others to leave you in charge. You are the best because you are the fastest and most certain. Your false assumptions arrogantly crush the concerns of others. You exaggerate the fanatical righteousness of your Box to assert yourself as the dictator.

       

      Blue Brain – unconscious fear of being wrong keeps you in control as the Possibility Management police. Fierce argumentation from your superior understanding determines who or what is correct. You must demolish anyone who makes a mistake, banishing or punishing them in public, for fear they tarnish your perfection.

    • Phoenix Process Experiments

      "Phoenixing three times before breakfast is the start of a very fine day."

      - from an experienced Possibilitator

      ASK FOR THE PURPOSE

      Matrix Code PHOENIXP.01

      Every day for a week, ask three people what is the purpose of what they are doing?
      Because the first answer is only the first layer of a multi-layered matter, always ask three times. That means you answer the first answer you get by saying, "And what is the purpose of that?" You also question the second answer again.
      All people are constantly doing something as long as they are alive.

      And everything they do creates results.

      The results don't lie.
      Write the results in your BEEP!Book.

       

      After completing this experiment, please register Matrix Code PHOENIXP.01 in your free account at StartOver.xyz.

      This Experiment is worth 1 Matrix Point.

      WHAT IS THE PURPOSE OF WHAT YOU ARE DOING?

      Matrix Code PHOENIXP.02

      Choose someone you know and ask them to ask you three times a day for a week what the purpose of what you are doing right now is.

      So he may call you while you are peeling potatoes and ask you what the purpose of the activity is.

      Your acquaintance should always ask you five times. This means that he answers the first answer he gets by saying, "And what is the purpose of this?" He also questions the other answers again.
      Write down all the fifth answers in your BEEP!Book.

       

      After completing this experiment, please register Matrix Code PHOENIXP.02 in your free account at StartOver.xyz.

      This Experiment is worth 1 Matrix Point.

      RESULTS DON'T LIE

      Matrix Code PHOENIXP.03

      Review the results you have created. Do this by contrasting the purpose and the results.

      Take your list of fifth responses and write behind each what you created in that act/by that action. This can be several things.
      The point is not to evaluate the results or to blame and condemn or praise yourself and others. It is simply to see if the results are reflected in the purpose.
      For each result, write down whether it is in line with the purpose.


      After completing this experiment, please register Matrix Code PHOENIXP.03 in your free account at StartOver.xyz.

      This Experiment is worth 1 Matrix Point.

      STOP BUYING PLASTIC

      Matrix Code PHOENIXP.04

      Do not buy products made of plastic for a whole month.

      Do not buy food packaged in plastic or TetraPak.

      Reject plastic bags. Wear only clothes made of natural materials.

      Don't compromise anymore when it comes to plastic packaging.
      Go through your entire home and pick up all plastic items.

      Think of plastic-free alternatives. If you can't think of any, ask friends for alternatives or do some research on the Internet.

      If the items in your household are disposable, such as toothbrushes, buy toothbrushes made from natural materials next time.

      If they are items you can use for years, keep them and replace them when the time comes.

       

      After completing this experiment, please register Matrix Code PHOENIXP.04 in your free account at StartOver.xyz.

      This Experiment is worth 1 Matrix Point.

      STOP THE SHOW

      Matrix Code PHOENIXP.05

      Remove all the objects from your apartment, with the help of which you will play your little show.

      For example, a show is a picture that shows a beautiful landscape and that hangs there because you want to appear as someone who loves nature and is therefore a special person. Remove the picture.

      A show is also playing the designer chair. If someone asks you, you can tell a lot about the chair and its designer. Stop this show and give the chair away.

      Remove all the things you put there so someone will see them and think you are cool, so someone will think you are special because those things are special,
      so that someone will think differently of you because those things are there.
      Maybe you need to move because the whole apartment is a show.

      Consider that.


      After completing this experiment, please register Matrix Code PHOENIXP.05 in your free account at StartOver.xyz.

      This Experiment is worth 1 Matrix Point.

      STOP DISTRACTING YOURSELF

      Matrix Code PHOENIXP.06

      Write 10 ways to numb and distract yourself in your Beep!Book.
      Don't stop at 7. Write down 10.
      Then call a person and ask them to name 5 numbers between 1 and 10.
      Avoid these 5 distractions for a whole week.
      After the week, call the person again and tell them about this experiment and what you created.

       

      After completing this experiment, please register Matrix Code PHOENIXP.06 in your free account at StartOver.xyz.

      This Experiment is worth 1 Matrix Point.

      SLEEP OUTDOORS

      Matrix Code PHOENIXP.07

      Sleep outdoors for 5 nights so that you can see the sky above you while you fall asleep.

       

      After completing this experiment, please register Matrix Code PHOENIXP.07 in your free account at StartOver.xyz.

      This Experiment is worth 1 Matrix Point.

      WHAT ARE YOU BURNING FOR?

      Matrix Code PHOENIXP.08

      Check out all of Max Wilbert's Facebook posts about his stint at Thacker Pass.
      https://www.facebook.com/max.wilbert
      What are you so passionate about that you want to tell others about it?

      Find 3 things.
      What are you so passionate about that you want to write and publish an article about it?

      Find 3 things.
      What are you so passionate about that you talk about it, record what you talk about, and then post it on Facebook?

      Find 3 things.
      What are you so passionate about that you do a Worktalk about it?

      Find 3 things.

       

      After completing this experiment, please register Matrix Code PHOENIXP.08 in your free account at StartOver.xyz.

      This Experiment is worth 3 Matrix Points.

      PAY ATTENTION FOR THE ECHO OF YOUR FEELINGS

      Matrix Code PHOENIXP.09

      Slow down enough to trace the echoes of your circulating emotions and feelings. Notice where in your body the emotions and feelings are located and moving. In what tissue does your anger circulate?
      In which tissue does your fear circulate?
      In which tissue does your sadness circulate?
      In what tissue does your joy circulate?
      How do the emotions and feelings move within you? Describe it with spoken and written words, draw and dance it.
      Listen for individual feelings that can fade away very quickly, like acoustic sounds.

       

      After completing this experiment, please register Matrix Code PHOENIXP.09 in your free account at StartOver.xyz.

      This Experiment is worth 1 Matrix Point:

    • StartOver.xyz

      NOTE: This website is a Bubble in the Bubble Map of the free-to-play, massively-multiplayer, online-and-offline, thoughtware-upgrade, matrix-building, personal-transformation, adventure-game called StartOver.xyz. It is a doorway to experiments that upgrade your thoughtware so you can create more possibility. Your knowledge is what you think about. Your thoughtware is what you use to think with. When you change your thoughtware, you go through a liquid state as your mind reorganizes itself. Liquid states can bring up transformational feelings and emotions. By upgrading your thoughtware you build matrix to hold more consciousness and leave behind a life of reactivity. No one can upgrade your thoughtware for you. No one can stop you from upgrading your thoughtware. Our theory is that when we collectively build 1,000,000 new Matrix Points we will change the morphogenetic field of the human race for the better. Please choose responsibly to read this website. Reading this whole website is worth 1 Matrix Point. Doing any of the experiments earns you additional Matrix Points. Please use Matrix Code PHOENIXP.00 to log your Matrix Point for reading this website on StartOver.xyz. Thank you for playing full out!

      What Are Cookies?

      Cookies are bits of information (memory files) stored in your browser by sites you visit. As is common practice with almost all websites, this site uses cookie to improve your experience by remembering your preferences and enable other cookie-based features (e.g. analytics).

      Our Cookies

      When you submit data through a form such as those found on contact pages or comment forms, cookies may be set to remember your user details for future correspondence.

      In order to provide you with a better experience and remember your preferences, we need to set cookies so that this information can be called whenever you interact with a page.

      Third-Party cookies

      In special cases, we also use cookies provided by trusted third parties like Google Analytics. Third party analytics are used to track and measure usage of this site so that we can continue to produce engaging content.

      How To Disable Cookies?

      Most browsers let you to refuse to accept cookies. See your browser Help or Tool for how to do this. Be aware that disabling cookies may affect the functionality of this and many other websites you visit. Therefore, it is recommended that you do not disable cookies.

      Cookie Use
